name: memory-compiler
description: Karpathy-style local-first LLM Wiki / Knowledge Compiler for Claude Code. Ingest sources, build a structured markdown knowledge base, and maintain it with AI-powered workflows.
author: memory-compiler contributors

ingest-source.description: Ingest a raw source into the knowledge base

query-wiki.description: Query the knowledge base and get answers with provenance

update-index.description: Rebuild and update all knowledge base indexes

health-check.description: Audit wiki health: orphans, duplicates, stale pages, weak links

generate-insights.description: Synthesize new insights from existing knowledge
